Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language

  • Uses of VarTemplate in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return VarTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static VarTemplate
    ValueResolver.getCompiledTemplate(String expression)
    Returns the compiled VarTemplate for the given expression, computing and caching on first use.

  • Uses of VarTemplate in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl that return VarTemplate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VarTemplate
    VarResolver.compile(String input)
    Compiles a template string into a reusable VarTemplate.
    VarTemplate
    VarResolverSession.compile(String input)
    Compiles the given template string into a reusable VarTemplate.
